name: voxel-blokowisko-diorama
description: Trans City Express — a living voxel city diorama in the browser: portal train, day/night cycle with golden hour, weather with accumulating winter, themed morphing (incl. Cyberpunk) and tiny story actors (cow & UFO, fisherman, postman). Three.js + TypeScript, 60 FPS on Apple M1.
author: Piotr Siwiński
